  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad ẜazzija Sauls usto:
Rapehz eﬅat juhs prett man fa-
pinnutchees/ tu un Tsaja Dehls/
ta/ ka tu wixxam eﬅi Maist de-
wis/ un to Sohbinu/ un Deewu
wixxa labbad waizajs/ ka tam
bij prett man zeltees/ ittin ka tas
ſchodeen redsans irr?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad atbildeja Akimeleks
tam Kehnixmn/ un ẜazzija:
Kurſch tad starp wiﬀeem tarweem
Kalpeem tik peetizzigs irr/ka Dah-
wids/ paſcha Kehnixa Snohts/
un tas staiga tew paklaufidains/
nn tohp Gohdá turrehts tawa
Nammá.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Eﬁnu es tad ſchodeen ee-
fahzis Deewu wixxa pehz wai-
zaht? ne muhſcham es ( to dar-
riſchu/) lai tas Kehnixch tah-
du Leetu us fawuKalpu ne greeſch/
neds us wiﬀu mannu Tehwa
Nammu/ jo taws Kalps irr no
wiſahun ſchahm Leetahm ne neeka
ﬁnnajs/ nei masu nei leelu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad ẜazzija tas Kehnixch:
Tew irr teeschaun jamirst/Akime-
leks/ tew un wiﬀam tawa Teh-
wa Namnam.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Kehnixch ẜazzija
us teem Sargeem/ kas pee win-
na ſtahweja: Greeſeetees/un no-
kaujeet ta KUNGA Preesterus/
tapehz ka wixxu Rohka arri ar
Dahwidu irr/ un ka tee ſinnaj-
ſchi wixxu behgam/ un man to
ne irr ẜazzijſchi. Bet ta Kehnixa
Kalpi ne gribbeja tawn Rohku is-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad ẜazzija tas Kehnixſc
us Doëgu: Greeſees tu/un lan-
sees us teem Preestereem. Ta-
greesehs Doëgs tas Gedomiteris/
un lausahs us teem Preestereim,
un nokawe tai Deena astoxdef-
mits un peezus Wihruß/ kas ta-
linnu Gewodu nefte.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiꞥſch titte arri Nobu-
tcho Preesteru Pulſahtu ar Soh-
bina Afmini/ tik labbi Wihrue-
ka Geetwas/ ir Behrnuß ka Siha-
schamus/ ir Wehrſchus/ ir Eha-
ſetus/ ir fihkus Lohpus nokawe-
wiꞥſch ar ta Sohbina Afmini.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tomeer weens no teeu-
DehleeinAkimeleka/AkitabaDeh-
la/ ar wahrdn Abjatarß/ tsbeh-
dse/ un behdse Dahwidam pakkak/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Abjatarß stahstiia
Dahwidam/ ka Sauls ta KUN-
GA Preesterus bij nokawis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad ẜazzija Dahwids ue
Abjataru: Gann es to ſinnaju-
tai Deená/ kad Doëgs tas Gedo-
mteris tur bija/ka tas Saulam-
to teeschaun atſazzitu. Es efimu-
noseedſis pee wiﬀahm Dwehſe-
lehmi tawa Tehwa Namnia.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Paleez pee mannis/ ne bih-
stees/ kas mannu Dsihwibu mek-
le/ tam buhs arri tawn Dsihwi-
bu mekleht/ jo tu tapſi ar man-
nim paſargahts.
"
    }
